note: Iran claims 1,300+ civilians killed and ~10,000 civilian sites struck (incl. ~8,000 residential homes, schools, medical facilities). Hengaw estimates 4,300+ total (incl. ~390 civilians) in first 10 days. HRANA estimates exceed 2,400 including 181+ children. US forces struck 5,000+ targets across 30 of 31 provinces since Feb 28. Internet blackout 240+ hrs (~1% connectivity) severely limits verification.
Schoolgirls and staff killed in missile strike on primary school.
Includes Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei; figures are evolving.

8 KIA confirmed. ~140 total wounded per Pentagon (Mar 11): 'vast majority minor, 108 have returned to duty, 8 severely injured.' 6 Army Reserve killed in Kuwait drone strike (Feb 28); Sgt. Benjamin N. Pennington (1st Space Brigade, died Mar 8 from wounds at Prince Sultan AB); 1 additional casualty.

Includes 9 killed at Beit Shemesh synagogue; 2 civilians killed by Iranian cluster warhead missile in Yehud on March 10; missile strikes on Tel Aviv, Jerusalem, Yehud, and central Israel. 174+ attack waves recorded since Feb 28.

Includes 2 armed forces officers killed in helicopter crash (Mar 9) during operations. 4 killed and 112 injured from Iranian strikes. 21 drones hit civilian targets. Fujairah oil facility fire from debris.

source: Lebanese health authorities / gov disaster management office
note: 750,000 displaced (up from 700,000). Includes 83+ children killed. Israeli strikes continuing on Hezbollah and Quds Force positions in Beirut suburbs and southern Lebanon. France called emergency UN Security Council meeting on Lebanon. HRW reports white phosphorus use in residential areas.
Includes 4 Popular Mobilization Forces fighters killed; 3 injured.
At least 32 injured (including children) from Iranian strike on Sitra island; Bapco refinery struck causing force majeure; 1 fatality from earlier intercepted missile debris.

Two foreign nationals (Indian and Bangladeshi) killed in Iranian projectile strike on Al-Kharj compound. IRGC claimed target was radar systems. Saudi forces intercepted UAVs targeting Shaybah oil field.
Fatality and injuries from projectile hitting a tanker off Muscat coast.
Jordan targeted by 119 Iranian missiles and drones since Feb 28. No fatalities reported.
Protesters stormed US Consulate; security forces opened fire.
